classification_contract: Each audited symbol has exactly one numbered governed category.

mapping_corrections.reason: same CIK and composite FIGI; contiguous adjusted provider history
same CIK and composite FIGI; contiguous adjusted provider history
provider-verified merger successor with contiguous adjusted history; entity identifiers intentionally differ

production_history_refresh.configured_path: existing provider router -> strict-live Polygon daily history -> DailyBarStorage

scope: The exact 138 symbols absent from the canonical master at the validated Stage 8.75 baseline.

support_policy.exchange_listed_adrs: supported when current Polygon metadata and adjusted strict-live history both validate
support_policy.missing_history: never converted to zero and never substituted with fixtures, generated data, or another symbol
support_policy.otc_adrs: not registered in this pass; explicit instrument-policy review required
